leakage_fix: All aggregate features (merchant_avg_surplus, category_avg_surplus, type_avg_surplus, dow_avg_sold, dow_avg_surplus) are now computed using expanding-window logic with shift(1), preventing target lookahead. surplus_vs_merchant_avg was removed — it used current-row surplus_quantity (the target) as a feature input.
selection_note: Selected based on temporal holdout MAE. XGBoost outperformed Random Forest on forward-looking temporal holdout (MAE 0.6355 vs 0.8453). All metrics reflect temporal holdout, not random holdout.

validation.method: Temporal 80/20 holdout (last 20% of dates as holdout, sorted by date)
validation.result: XGBoost MAE 0.6355 vs RF MAE 0.8453 (temporal holdout)
validation.cv_result: CV MAE 1.38 ± 1.22 (high variance across temporal folds reflects distributional shift in synthetic data)

note: Metrics are from synthetic/prototype data. They indicate technical feasibility and feature-signal logic, not production accuracy. Real merchant pilot validation required before commercial deployment.
